class.name: JustAMCPRuntime
class.brief_description: A runtime singleton that hosts the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for JustAMCP.
class.description: JustAMCPRuntime is the core Engine singleton that runs a local server, managing Model Context Protocol (MCP) communication with external AI agents safely independently of the SceneTree.

method.name: execute_command
method.description: Executes an MCP command by forwarding it to the appropriate internal toolkit or capability handler.

method.name: poll
method.description: Manually processes incoming network transactions, handles new connections natively, and evaluates active payloads asynchronously.

signal.name: client_connected
signal.description: Emitted when a new Model Context Protocol client successfully connects and authenticates to the internal TCP server.

signal.name: client_disconnected
signal.description: Emitted when an active Model Context Protocol client disconnects, errors out, or explicitly terminates the connection.

signal.name: command_received
signal.description: Emitted when the runtime parses an incoming payload from an MCP client. Used internally to relay the [param command] and its corresponding [param params] payload to the ecosystem executor.
